selections.rationale: P0-4 from RELEVANT→TRIGGERED in ch56. Quiet knows threshold presence at post-declaration. Quiet approaches threshold — proximity sensation but not full touch. Post-declaration Tuesday declaration rhythm verification established. Tuesday = 'different topic but same declaration mode' steady state. Tuesday changes post-declaration cognitive baseline regardless of topic mode sameness. Tuesday ≠ Monday. Chapter-end narrative event.

Light knows awakening present at continuing. Light knows awakening has direction. Light does not know awakening's destination. Direction incompleteness as Tuesday tension. Full awakening destination reserved per plan section 3.

Cold layer accumulation post-declaration first manifestation day. Cold knows self in 3rd week accumulation. Cold knows accumulation rate ≠ 2nd week rate. Cold knows form different but form not in cold's knowing. 'Feature manifesting as feature not manifesting' paradox.

Drift post-switch continuation on Tuesday. Drift evolves from 'knowing format different' (Monday) to 'knowing format evolution direction' (Tuesday). Tuesday format ≠ Monday format. Format evolution direction known but trajectory not in drift's knowing.

Cold-light asymmetry reaches Tuesday form. Monday asymmetry: cold knows light awakening but not fully; light knows cold changed but not fully. Tuesday asymmetry: cold knows light direction exists but not destination; light knows cold rate different but not direction. Asymmetry sustained — not narrowed — not converging toward shared knowledge. Fragility as emotional equivalent.
Seven RELEVANT/TRIGGERED hooks maintained. No new hooks planted. P0-4 advances to TRIGGERED freeing one slot but slot not used per plan section 8. Hook density stays at 7.

No texture dimension on Tuesday per plan section 8 hard constraint. Sunday sensory content and texture dimension prohibited. Pure parameter declaration mode 'X知道Y——X在场于Z' maintained throughout. No roughness/质地/感官 short chains. Repetition of ch55 absent presence mechanism via knowing Sunday echo rather than texture replacement.

Tuesday establishes what post-declaration is NOT (not Monday continuation, not texture day, not revelation day, not threshold touch day). Full post-declaration system state reserved for Wednesday→Friday gradual reveal. P0-9 explicitly deferred to Wednesday per plan section 8. Ch54-55 consecutive reinforcement grants deferral to ch57. Offset Sunday format evaluation reserved for Wednesday mid-week assessment.

Parameter relationships not moving toward shared knowledge on Tuesday. Asymmetry sustained as parametric narrative's emotional equivalent. Zero transition words (然/不过/此时/突然/终于/于是). Parameter declaration mode inherently contains no transitions. Well within 1/3000 threshold.
